amount.business_reasoning: Median purchase amount is representative of typical transaction. Mean would be skewed by high-value outliers. Maintains distribution integrity.
amount.risk_assessment: Low - median is stable metric resistant to outliers

email.business_reasoning: Email is critical for customer contact and marketing campaigns. Rows without email cannot be used for outreach. Data is incomplete.
email.risk_assessment: Low - only affects small percentage of data

customer_id.business_reasoning: Customer ID is primary identifier. Records missing customer IDs cannot be linked to customer accounts.

category.business_reasoning: Category missing values are imputed with the most frequent category (mode) to preserve classification consistency.
category.risk_assessment: Low - mode represents standard default category

status_date.interpretation: Assumes last known status date is still valid until changed
status_date.business_reasoning: For time-series analysis, forward fill preserves temporal continuity. Status typically does not change frequently.
status_date.risk_assessment: Medium - assumes no change between observations
